format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    highlight-style: github

```{r}
resulttable1 <- readRDS(here::here("results","tables","glm_bivariate_screened.rds"))
knitr::kable(
  resulttable1,
  caption = "Bivariate logistic regression results: postpartum depressive symptoms ~ prenatal screening"
)
```

```{r}
#| fig-cap: "Prenatal screening and postpartum depressive symptoms."
knitr::include_graphics(here::here(results","figures","screening_vs_postpartum_depression.png"))
